description: Create a complex GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-build that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of three jobs: build-native, build-compiler, and test-compiler. The build-native job builds native artifacts on multiple platforms (macOS, Linux, Windows) with different configurations, while the build-compiler job builds .NET compiler artifacts that depend on the native artifacts. The test-compiler job tests the compiler on multiple platforms with various test environments and coverage analysis.
